semantic.role: TypeScript interface defining a data structure for file metadata snapshots within the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: Defines the shape of a file status snapshot, including modification time (mtime) and file size.
Provides a type contract for components that need to pass or store file metadata consistently.
outOfScope: Direct integration with scanners, engines, or services.
invariants: Pure type definition with no executable code.
Exports a single interface for structural typing.
Serves as a stable data contract across the codebase.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a centralized, type-safe contract for file metadata to ensure consistency across scanning, comparison, and reporting components.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes detected in this file; the git intent 'tighten schema handling' likely pertains to other modules.
